title: Migrate model dependency downloads from Hugging Face to Cloudflare R2
description: Move all MPI-owned re-hosted model weights off Hugging Face onto Cloudflare R2 and repoint every dependency/download URL at R2. ROOT CAUSE: long-lived HF/Xet streams degrade in waves (sawtooth 40MB/s -> sub-MB/s -> climbs back) during large local downloads (observed live on ltx23-gemma-clip, MPI-127). The in-app slow-stream reconnect watchdog (commit 02ef2c0) correctly rides out self-recovering dips and does NOT fix the throttling. R2 fixes it at the source: free unlimited egress, own CDN, flat throughput, download-volume-proof bill (~$0.75/mo storage for ~60GB, NO per-download cost no matter how many users pull). Use R2 Standard, NOT Infrequent Access (IA's $0.01/GB retrieval fee defeats the point for user-facing weights). WORK ITEMS: (1) UPDATE UPLOAD SCRIPTS — extend the existing rclone->R2 build-upload flow (cubric-builds bucket, see R2 upload procedure / mpi-release-shared) to also push model weights to a models/ prefix; this is the same rclone connection already configured. (2) UPLOAD ALL FILES — rclone copy every MPI-owned re-host currently on Mad-Pony-Interactive/cubric-studio (LTX-2.3: gemma-clip + LoRAs soft-enhance/transition/talkvid; plus prior re-hosts: Wan, Singularity, gemma-heretic, ID-LoRA, lipdub per the dep re-host rule) to R2. (3) UPDATE DEPENDENCY + DOWNLOAD LINKS — swap every huggingface.co/Mad-Pony-Interactive/... url in js/data/modelConstants/dependencies.js to the R2 custom-domain URL; verify sha256 still matches post-upload. SCOPE: only MPI-OWNED re-hosts move. Upstream files NOT ours (Kijai/LTX2.3_comfy base weights, Lightricks spatial-upscaler) stay on HF unless/until MPI-128 item 2 self-hosts them — at which point those land on R2 too, not HF. CROSS-REF MPI-128 (item 2 self-hosts the 5 LTX base files; coordinate so both land on R2). DEFERRED from 2026-06-25 session to avoid blocking tonight's release. RELEASE-GATING: tonight's drop is Patreon/Pro-only (0 subscribers -> safe without R2). The FIRST PUBLIC GitHub release ships from master in ~2 weeks and MUST have R2 links for fast downloads. So this card ALSO requires: (a) land R2 dep URLs on master, (b) watchdog needs NO master action - verified master never had it (add 02ef2c0 + disable a780e0a both RunPod-only), so master never had the crash; just confirm public build has no live watchdog, (c) bump master 1.0.1 -> v1.0.2 for the public launch. See brief.md 'Release targets' section.
